prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京大学医学部在江西省理科/物理类最低录取位次分别为约229名、232名、208名、366名、1184名。2021–2023年位次稳定在200–230名区间，2024年江西省首次实施新高考（物理类），位次后移至366名；2025年进一步大幅后移至1184名，近两年累计后移约976名，反映出新高考模式下专业组投档、选科要求等因素对位次分布产生了显著影响。2025年基准位次约1184名；该校在江西省理科/物理类招生计划：2021年27人、2022年28人、2023年28人、2024年28人、2025年29人，呈逐年小幅递增趋势。2026年招生计划为31人，较2025年增加2人，扩招约6.9%，扩招幅度较为明显，对竞争压力有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学医学部隶属于北京大学，为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名中北京大学位列第2名（医学部作为北大组成部分），属国内顶尖高校层次，对高分考生具有极强吸引力；2026年高考周期内北京大学（含医学部）声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及校园安全、录取断档等舆情事件；抖音热度排名第3（高热），短视频平台曝光量极大。声誉偏负面可能轻微抑制部分考生的报考热情，但抖音高热反映整体关注度仍处高位。历史投档异常方面，北京大学在2025年湖北省本科提前批首次出现招生空档现象；北京大学医学部依托北京大学学科优势，临床医学评估为A、口腔医学评估为A、基础医学评估为A、药学评估为A+、护理学评估为A+，均为国内顶尖水平。招生专业涵盖临床医学（八年制本博连读）、口腔医学（八年制本博连读）、基础医学（八年制本博连读）、药学（六年制本硕连读）、预防医学（七年制本硕连读）等长学制精英培养项目，学科实力与培养模式对高分考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学在2023–2026年专业热度分析中持续被评为高热推荐/推荐，社会关注度与报考意愿居高不下。江西省2026年高考总报名人数约474,900人，较2025年略有增加；按近年物理类占比约56.4%估算，2026年物理类考生约267,844人，较2025年增加约1,419人，考生规模小幅增长使竞争略有加剧。；北京大学医学部位于北京市，非江西省本地高校，无本地招生倾斜。该校在全国范围内招生，江西省招生计划占比极小（2025年江西省招生20人，占全国总计划约3.3%），跨省报考竞争主要取决于全国范围内高分考生的报考意愿分布。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1184名、2026年扩招约6.9%（计划从29人增至31人）对位次数字的推升作用、江西省物理类考生规模小幅增长带来的竞争略加剧、医学类专业持续高热的社会热度、以及学校声誉偏负面与抖音高热并存的多重信号。预测2026年最低录取位次约1248名，区间1098–1398名。扩招是位次数字增大的主要驱动因素，医学专业高热则对位次数字有向下支撑，两者综合作用下位次较2025年小幅后移。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（八年制本博连读）
- 口腔医学（八年制本博连读）
- 基础医学（八年制本博连读）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 口腔医学（五年）
- 临床医学（五年）
- 药学（六年制本硕连读）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 预防医学（七年制本硕连读）
- 暂无其他三档专业。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间1098–1398名内，建议以二档专业（五年制临床/口腔、药学本硕）为主攻方向，一档专业（八年制本博连读）作为冲刺，三档预防医学作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<1098名）可重点冲刺一档八年制专业。北京大学医学部长学制培养项目竞争极为激烈，报考时需结合个人兴趣与职业规划综合权衡。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Peking University Health Science Center in Jiangxi Province's science/physics category were approximately 229, 232, 208, 366, and 1184, respectively. Rankings were stable in the 200–230 range from 2021 to 2023. In 2024, Jiangxi implemented the new college entrance examination for the first time (physics category), and the ranking shifted to 366; in 2025, it further dropped significantly to 1184, with a cumulative shift of about 976 positions over the past two years, indicating that factors such as major group filing and subject selection requirements under the new exam model have significantly impacted ranking distribution. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1184. Enrollment plans for the university in Jiangxi's science/physics category: 27 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 28 in 2024, and 29 in 2025, showing a slight annual increase. The 2026 enrollment plan is 31, an increase of 2 from 2025, representing an expansion of about 6.9%, which is relatively significant and helps alleviate competitive pressure to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University Health Science Center is affiliated with Peking University, a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, Peking University ranks 2nd (with the Health Science Center as a component), placing it among the top-tier domestic universities, strongly attracting high-scoring students. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation of Peking University (including the Health Science Center) is rated as somewhat negative, mainly involving public opinion events such as campus safety and admission gaps. It ranks 3rd in Douyin popularity (high heat), with extremely high exposure on short video platforms. The somewhat negative reputation may slightly suppress some students' enthusiasm for applying, but the high Douyin heat indicates that overall attention remains high. Regarding historical admission anomalies, Peking University experienced its first admission gap in the 2025 Hubei Province undergraduate early batch. Relying on Peking University's disciplinary advantages, the Health Science Center's clinical medicine is rated A, stomatology A, basic medicine A, pharmacy A+, and nursing A+, all at the domestic top level. Admission majors include long-term elite training programs such as clinical medicine (eight-year bachelor-doctor continuous program), stomatology (eight-year bachelor-doctor continuous program), basic medicine (eight-year bachelor-doctor continuous program), pharmacy (six-year bachelor-master continuous program), and preventive medicine (seven-year bachelor-master continuous program), with strong disciplinary strength and training models that highly attract high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical medicine and stomatology have been consistently rated as high-heat recommended/recommended in the 2023–2026 major popularity analysis, with high social attention and application willingness. The total number of Jiangxi Province 2026 college entrance examination registrants is approximately 474,900, slightly higher than in 2025. Based on the recent physics category proportion of about 56.4%, the estimated number of physics category examinees in 2026 is about 267,844, an increase of about 1,419 from 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition due to the small growth in examinee numbers. Peking University Health Science Center is located in Beijing, not a local university in Jiangxi Province, so there is no local admission preference. The university recruits nationwide, with a very small proportion of enrollment plans in Jiangxi Province (in 2025, 20 students were admitted from Jiangxi, accounting for about 3.3% of the total national plan). Cross-province application competition mainly depends on the distribution of high-scoring students' application intentions nationwide.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 1184, the boosting effect of the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 6.9% (plan increasing from 29 to 31) on ranking numbers, the slight intensification of competition due to the small growth in Jiangxi's physics category examinee numbers, the sustained high social heat of medical majors, and the coexistence of somewhat negative school reputation and high Douyin heat. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will be approximately 1248, with a range of 1098–1398. The enrollment expansion is the main driving factor for the increase in ranking numbers, while the high heat of medical majors provides downward support for ranking numbers. Under the combined effect, the ranking will shift slightly downward compared to 2025.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Bachelor-Doctor Continuous Program)
- Stomatology (Eight-Year Bachelor-Doctor Continuous Program)
- Basic Medicine (Eight-Year Bachelor-Doctor Continuous Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Stomatology (Five-Year)
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year)
- Pharmacy (Six-Year Bachelor-Master Continuous Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Preventive Medicine (Seven-Year Bachelor-Master Continuous Program)
- No other tier 3 majors available.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 1098–1398, it is recommended to focus on tier 2 majors (five-year clinical/stomatology, pharmacy bachelor-master) as the main direction, tier 1 majors (eight-year bachelor-doctor continuous programs) as a stretch, and tier 3 preventive medicine as a safety option. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1098), you can focus on aiming for tier 1 eight-year programs. The long-term training programs at Peking University Health Science Center are extremely competitive, so when applying, you need to comprehensively weigh personal interests and career plans.
